title: MultiOutputAttribute
description:
MultiOutputAttribute: Attribute providing information about an output parameter of a multi-output method.
To be applied to all methods that return BH.oM.Base.Output types.

Index.description: Zero-based index of the output parameter this attribute corresponds to.

Name.description: Name of the correspondent output parameter (to be used in the UI).

Description.description: Description of the correspondent output parameter.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
